name: Elements
description: Modal synthesis voice combining bowed/blown/struck exciters with a tuned resonator (strings, plates, tubes). Built-in reverb and stereo output. Also processes external audio through the resonator.

controls.name: BOW
controls.description: Amount of bowed excitation. Continuous friction noise scraping the resonator.

controls.name: BLOW
controls.description: Amount of blown (breath-noise) excitation. Gated by envelope on GATE.

controls.name: STRIKE
controls.description: Amount of struck (mallet/pluck) excitation. Impulse-based, triggered by GATE edges.

controls.name: FLOW
controls.description: Character of blown noise (timbre of breath signal).
controls.detail: CCW: dark airy · CW: bright shaped noise

controls.name: MALLET
controls.detail: CCW: wooden stick · noon: mallet · CW: sine-wave strike

controls.name: COARSE
controls.description: Coarse pitch of the resonator body.

controls.name: FM Attenuverter
controls.description: Scales and inverts FM CV input to resonator pitch.

controls.name: GEOMETRY
controls.description: Model-dependent resonator geometry — string stiffness, plate size, tube shape.

controls.name: BRIGHTNESS
controls.description: High-frequency content of the resonator — stiffness-damping tradeoff.

controls.name: DAMPING
controls.description: Decay time of resonator — how long the body rings after excitation.
controls.detail: CCW: staccato · CW: near-infinite sustain (resonator self-oscillates)

controls.name: POSITION
controls.description: Strike/excitation position along the resonator — equivalent to pickup position on a string.
controls.detail: CCW: edge · CW: center · modulate for tremolo-like motion

controls.name: SPACE
controls.description: Amount of built-in reverb applied to the output.
controls.detail: CCW: dry · CW: lush stereo hall · CV summed

controls.name: Resonator Model Button
controls.description: Cycles resonator model: modal synthesis, sympathetic strings, non-linear string, or modulated/inharmonic string.
controls.detail: 4 models · LEDs indicate selection · firmware 1.2 adds alternate modes (ominous/Kenaz/etc.)

controls.name: Exciter CV Attenuverters
controls.description: Three small attenuverters for BOW/BLOW/STRIKE CV inputs.
controls.detail: CCW: invert · noon: zero · CW: unity

inputs.name: GATE
inputs.description: Gate input — sustains BLOW breath, triggers STRIKE impulse, and holds BOW active.

inputs.name: FM
inputs.description: Frequency modulation of the resonator. Scaled by FM attenuverter.

inputs.name: BLOW IN (external)
inputs.description: External audio input replacing internal breath noise source. Patch in any audio as the blown excitation.

inputs.name: STRIKE IN (external)
inputs.description: External audio input replacing internal mallet impulse. Patch in any audio as the strike exciter — turns Elements into a modal processor of incoming audio.

outputs.name: AUX OUT (L)
outputs.description: Left stereo output. In mono use, dry-biased raw resonator sound.

outputs.name: MAIN OUT (R)
outputs.description: Right stereo output. In mono use, this is the primary processed output with built-in reverb.

behaviors.name: Three-exciter hybrid voice
behaviors.description: Three exciter types sum simultaneously before entering the resonator. Blend for complex sounds (bowed attack on a struck body, blown sustain on a plucked string). Each has its own CV for dynamic articulation.

behaviors.name: External audio through resonator
behaviors.trigger: audio patched into BLOW IN or STRIKE IN
behaviors.description: Replaces the internal exciter with external audio. Elements becomes a modal resonator processor — drums into STRIKE IN gain pitched modal ringing; pads into BLOW IN become vocalic filtered textures.

behaviors.name: Self-oscillating resonator
behaviors.trigger: DAMPING near full CW + steady BOW
behaviors.description: DAMPING taken to extreme sustains excitation indefinitely. With just BOW active the resonator sings as a pure sine-like voice. GEOMETRY and BRIGHTNESS sculpt the self-oscillating tone.

behaviors.name: Alt firmware modes (easter eggs)
behaviors.trigger: specific model-button combinations at power-up or long-press
behaviors.description: Firmware 1.2 adds alternate resonator models (ominous voice/Kenaz/Ens/drums) revealed by hidden button combinations at startup. Documented in later Mutable wiki.

behaviors.name: Stereo output spread
behaviors.description: AUX carries raw resonator body sound; MAIN carries reverberated voice. Panning L/R yields a natural-acoustic stereo image where dry body sits centered with wet tail spread.

behaviors.name: POSITION tremolo
behaviors.description: Modulating POSITION at audio or LFO rate creates a pickup-position tremolo — produces pulsing harmonic sidebands without amplitude-modulation artifacts.

behaviors.name: GEOMETRY model morphing
behaviors.description: GEOMETRY continuously morphs resonator shape within the selected model family. Slow CV sweeps turn fixed tones into organic evolving textures like warping metal or breathing wood.

behaviors.name: Calibration mode
behaviors.description: Standard Mutable calibration: apply 1V and 3V to V/OCT to tune precise tracking. Required after first install or temperature drift.

patchIdeas.name: Bowed string lead
patchIdeas.patch: Model: modal string · BOW full · BLOW/STRIKE off · DAMPING at 3 o'clock (long) · V/OCT from keyboard · GATE held while notes play · MAIN OUT through envelope-controlled VCA for dynamics
patchIdeas.diagram:
Elements:
* Model: Modal string

- Keyboard (Pitch) p> Elements (V/OCT)
- Keyboard (Gate) g> Elements (GATE)
- Elements (MAIN OUT) -> VCA (In) -> Output (In)
- Keyboard (Gate) g> Envelope (Trig)
- Envelope (Out) >> VCA (CV)

patchIdeas.name: Drums through modal body
patchIdeas.patch: External drum loop into STRIKE IN jack · all internal exciters at zero · resonator damping medium · clock sweeps V/OCT via quantizer for pitched modal drum processing · reverb (SPACE) at 10 o'clock
patchIdeas.diagram:
Elements:
* All exciters: 0

- Drum Loop (Out) -> Elements (STRIKE IN)
- Sequencer (Pitch) p> Quantizer (In)
- Quantizer (Out) p> Elements (V/OCT)
- Elements (MAIN OUT) -> Output (R)
- Elements (AUX OUT) -> Output (L)

patchIdeas.name: Breathy flute pad
patchIdeas.patch: BLOW full · BOW/STRIKE off · FLOW at 2 o'clock (bright breath) · DAMPING CW (long) · GEOMETRY swept by slow LFO for tube morphing · SPACE at 3 o'clock · sustained ethereal flute
patchIdeas.diagram:
Elements:
* Model: Tube

- Keyboard (Pitch) p> Elements (V/OCT)
- Keyboard (Gate) g> Elements (GATE)
- Slow LFO (Out) >> Elements (GEOMETRY CV)
- Elements (MAIN OUT) -> Output (R)
- Elements (AUX OUT) -> Output (L)

patchIdeas.name: Self-oscillating sine
patchIdeas.patch: DAMPING full CW · BOW at 10 o'clock (minimal) · BLOW/STRIKE off · GATE held constant (+5V offset) · resonator sings continuously · COARSE plays the pitch like a VCO · effectively a modal sine oscillator with body character
patchIdeas.diagram:
Elements:
* DAMPING: full CW (self-osc)

- Offset (+5V) g> Elements (GATE) // constant hold
- Sequencer (Pitch) p> Elements (V/OCT)
- Elements (MAIN OUT) -> VCA (In) -> Output (In)
- Envelope (Out) >> VCA (CV)

patchIdeas.name: Hybrid percussion hit
patchIdeas.patch: Model: non-linear string · STRIKE at 3 o'clock · MALLET at 12 (mallet character) · BOW at 9 (tiny scrape for noise attack) · short GATE from clock · DAMPING 11 o'clock (medium decay) · GEOMETRY CV from random source for per-hit variation
patchIdeas.diagram:
Elements:
* Model: Non-linear string

- Clock (Out) g> Elements (GATE)
- Sequencer (Pitch) p> Elements (V/OCT)
- S&H (Out) >> Elements (GEOMETRY CV) // per-hit variation
- Elements (MAIN OUT) -> Output (R)
- Elements (AUX OUT) -> Output (L)

patchIdeas.name: Pad through resonator
patchIdeas.patch: External pad/synth into BLOW IN · all internal exciters zero · Elements acts as resonant filter — pad picks up modal body · slow LFO on POSITION for pickup tremolo · SPACE at noon for room · vocal/metallic filtered pad
patchIdeas.diagram:
Elements:
* All exciters: 0

- Pad Synth (Out) -> Elements (BLOW IN)
- Slow LFO (Out) >> Elements (POSITION CV)
- Keyboard (Pitch) p> Elements (V/OCT)
- Keyboard (Gate) g> Elements (GATE)
- Elements (MAIN OUT) -> Output (R)
- Elements (AUX OUT) -> Output (L)

patchIdeas.name: Bouncing mallet on tube
patchIdeas.patch: Model: tube · STRIKE full · MALLET CW (sine mallet) · MATHS in bouncing-ball mode triggers GATE · accelerating bounces ring the tube · DAMPING set medium · natural decelerating physical simulation
patchIdeas.diagram:
Elements:
* Model: Tube

- MATHS (EOR) t> MATHS (Trig) // bouncing ball self-patch
- MATHS (Out) g> Elements (GATE)
- Elements (MAIN OUT) -> Output (R)
- Elements (AUX OUT) -> Output (L)

patchIdeas.name: Random modal dronescape
patchIdeas.patch: DAMPING CW · BOW constant · slow random CVs on GEOMETRY, BRIGHTNESS, POSITION · occasional STRIKE pulse from slow clock · ambient self-playing drone with spontaneous events · SPACE full CW
patchIdeas.diagram:
Elements:
* DAMPING: CW (long)
* SPACE: CW

- Offset (+5V) g> Elements (GATE)
- S&H 1 (Out) >> Elements (GEOMETRY CV)
- S&H 2 (Out) >> Elements (BRIGHTNESS CV)
- S&H 3 (Out) >> Elements (POSITION CV)
- Slow Clock (Out) t> Pulse Gen (Trig)
- Pulse Gen (Out) >> Elements (STRIKE CV)
- Elements (MAIN OUT) -> Output (R)
- Elements (AUX OUT) -> Output (L)
